programme.title: Honor Rolling Away
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah find themselves at a local University trying to reclaim a car from a not-so-honorable honor roll student with a squeaky voice. Then, Matt and Sonia are tasked with snagging a tricked-out race car from two vested thugs armed with golf clubs. Finally, Lou and Sonia head to a fancy part of town to repo an Escalade from a young professional and his unsupportive wife.

programme.title: Tijuana Surprise
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: The Crush
programme.desc: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career. First, the team repossesses a truck from a pair of larger-than-life debtors with a passion for exotic sports, then they grapple with a gaggle of drunken partiers who don't want to give up their tricked-out bus, and, Lou and Matt track a debtor to a junkyard.

programme.title: Bouquets and Blowtorches
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas, but there's trouble brewing within the crew's ranks. Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work, Matt and Froy confront a delinquent delivery man steeling flowers from graves, and Lou and Carlos are left defenseless against gang members with blowtorches. Can Lou still keep his cool in the high pressure repo business, or will there be repercussions for Matt and Froy that no one saw coming?

programme.title: Raising the Roof
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy deal with an unbalanced debtor who threatens to take down the entire company, while Matt and Ronnie take on children's book vendors who are up to no good.

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: Contact
programme.desc: After recovering their stolen truck, the reunited repo team is on pins and needles to hold their shaky alliance together.

programme.title: The Froylan Job
programme.desc: A hoarder with a secret tries to pull a fast one on Matt and Froy, and Sonia takes sides in a dramatic lover's quarrel. Froy finally gets a shot at recovering the Lamborghini, but will his ingenious plan come crashing down around him?

programme.title: Deep Dish Disaster
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia repo from a stranded motorist who rallies the neighborhood around his cause and incites a full on revolt. Ronnie and Carlos set out on their first unsupervised repo, but their desire to impress is quickly derailed when an erratic debtor lets loose with pepper spray.

programme.title: Up in Flames
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy repo a car from an anger management meeting, Froy suffers the consequences of taking on a violent rage-aholic.

programme.title: Adult Film Star
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew. Later, Lou, Sonia, and Froy head out to the boondocks to repo a BMW in the middle of an adult film shoot. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah ride out in Sonia's car to meet up with the debtor's sister-in-law who helps the team find the debtor's car.

programme.title: Off the Hitch
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything. When Matt, Froy, and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong, the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever.

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Now Serving Mrs. Pizarro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold, but have to put discussion on hold while they repo repo a hovercraft golf cart from a snooty golfer. Next, Sonia and Ronnie's easy day at the salon gets disastrous when the should-be debtor serves Sonia with a lawsuit. And finally, Froy and Carlos head out to a worksite to repo the bulldozer that Carlos should have been training for.

programme.title: Deprogrammed
programme.desc: DEPROGRAMMED chronicles Ted 'Black Lightning' Patrick's anti-cult crusade. His practice of deprogramming, also known as “reverse brainwashing,” quickly snowballed into a vast underground movement composed of concerned parents, ex-cultists, and sympathetic law-enforcers whose mission was to physically and mentally remove individuals from cults. Some of the people he's saved, however, wonder if his services cause more harm than good. Directed by Mia Donovan.

programme.title: Queen of Versailles

programme.title: The Hobby
programme.desc: A McDonald's Happy Meal shortage. A security guard escort. Guns pulled in a Target parking lot. All of these are caused by a common factor: trading cards. In 2020, a new BOOM began. For the first time, large hedge funds, celebrities like Logan Paul and Steve Aoki, nostalgic millennials, entrepreneurs like Josh Luber, and billionaires scrambled to add sports, Pokémon, and other hot item cards to their collections and portfolios. Over the next two years, the hobby exploded — even causing card grading services to shut down due to overwhelming customer service. This documentary is a character-driven feel good deep dive into the high-stakes, eccentric world of card collecting, following buyers, sellers, card shop owners, graders, online streamers, auctioneers, and more, who all participate in the hobby in their own unique ways. Directed by Morgan Jon Fox.

programme.title: This Is Not Financial Advice

programme.title: Nature's Survivors
programme.desc: Every year, the Earth is hit by cyclones, earthquakes, volcanoes and floods. These events make the headlines, with alarming human death toll numbers. But what about animals? This one-hour special explores how animals cope with natural disasters – before, during and after the events themselves. Animals have gone to great lengths to make the most out of some very perilous predicaments, and future climate change could force them to make even more changes in order to survive.

programme.title: Extraordinary Ecosystems
programme.desc: Discover the brilliant world of biodiversity in this natural history documentary. From the scorching sand dunes of Namibia, to the tropical Tasmanian rainforest, to the bitter waters of the Baltic Sea, this film visits the most extraordinary ecosystems and the creatures that inhabit them. We also learn how human activity has forced species into extinction and reflect on the importance of preserving diverse environments.

programme.desc: For the Lord and Taylor Challenge, the designers receive the opportunity to design a look for a capsule collection that celebrates ten seasons of Project Runway. If chosen as the winner, their look would join the ranks of many former Project Runway designers and winners, and it would be manufactured and sold at Lord and Taylor.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For this challenge, the designers divided into teams of three, and they must raise their own shopping money by selling t-shirts and other designs on the streets of NYC. Once they have raised their money, they have to design a two-piece fall collection, and one look must include a piece of outerwear.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For the HP Challenge, the designers must create their own textile and design a look that is representative of their heritage. They are surprised when a member of their family comes for a surprise visit and helps them with their inspiration.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.sub-title: I Get a Kick Out of Fashion
programme.desc: The designers are treated to a show at Radio City Music Hall, where they learn that they will be designing an outfit for the world-famous Rockettes to wear in an upcoming performance.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For Heidi's challenge, the designers arrive at Babies R Us where they learn that they will be designing an outfit for their youngest clients yet—babies! In a twist of fate, they are also made to take care of “real” babies: dolls that cry when they need to be changed, fed, or burped. And if that wasn't enough, Heidi throws another twist at the designers they also must create a complementary look for the baby's mom to wear.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.sub-title: In a Place Far, Far Away
programme.desc: As the designers face their final challenge before Mercedes Benz Fashion Week, they are tasked with their most difficult and creative challenge yet: making an avant-garde look inspired by L'Oreal's new line of makeup called “Electric Fantasie".

programme.title: Cadlao Lagoon: Philippines

programme.title: Fly Over Earth
programme.desc: Go on a global journey to some of the most scenic destinations the world has to offer.

programme.title: Fly Over Kelingking Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Enjoy a bird's eye view of a breathtaking scenic beach surrounded by pristine waters and high cliffs.

programme.title: Moraine Lake Relaxation
programme.desc: Relax and enjoy the dazzling beauty of one of the world's most beautiful lakes: Moraine Lake in Banff National Park. In this 1 hour film you can enjoy multiple stunning perspectives from above and ground level there are also a few mixed scenes of the surrounding lakes like Lake Louise, Bow Lake and Peyto Lake in 4K UHD. Paired with relaxing ambient music.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise 2
programme.desc: Leave your worries from the world above behind and dive into a vibrant undersea world inhabited by the iconic sea turtles, for 2 full hours of Nature Relaxation. Captured by filmmaker collaborators Tilo & Yvonne Kühnast, Turtle Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds & calming music for deep relaxation by Jason Stephenson.

programme.title: Kapas Biru Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escape to Indonesia with tropical vegetation and a spectacular rushing waterfall.

programme.title: A Day in San Diego 2
programme.desc: Transform your TV into a beautiful and relaxing window to the best city in the world - San Diego - with this 3-hour long video featuring 12 different 15 minute scenes from the city's best beaches: Coronado Beach, Pacific Beach, Mission Beach, Blacks Beach, Ocean Beach, Sunset Cliffs, Torrey Pines, and more.

programme.title: New Year Cheer: White SIlver and Gold
programme.desc: New Year Cheer: White SIlver and Gold E3 — Celebrate the dawn of a sparkling New Year with elegant strokes of white, silver, and gold. The artwork create a harmonious symphony of sophistication and hope, radiating a sense of renewal and opulence.

programme.title: Holiday Cheer
programme.desc: Holiday Cheer: Seasons Greetings E2 — Immerse yourself in a realm where the magic of the holidays materializes through vibrant brushstrokes and captivating photography. The music breathes new life into the sound of Christmas with groovy rhythms grounded by drum kits and funky basslines.

programme.title: Holiday Cheer
programme.desc: Holiday Cheer: Happy Holidays E1 — Step into a world where the enchantment of the season comes to life. The art evokes a profound sense of joy, warmth, and togetherness while the music sets a groovy and euphoric holiday tone with LoFi to soft house and rhythmic electro beats.

programme.title: Holiday Cheer In Motion
programme.desc: Holiday Cheer: In Motion E4 — Immerse yourself in the holiday spirit with our dynamic winter art collection, featuring mesmerizing motion art videos. These captivating works bring the magic of the season to life through ever-moving visuals, evoking a sense of wonder and enchantment.

programme.title: Shades Of Color: Seasonal Shades of Gold
programme.desc: Shades Of Color: Seasonal Shades of Gold E7 — Adorned in shimmering gold, the artwork radiates warmth and splendor, bringing a touch of luxury to your holiday celebrations, as they gleam with festive cheer and timeless elegance.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E2: Mark Scheff + Mischelle Moy — A fusion of the diverse artistic visions of our featured artists. Marc Scheff captures emotions through expressive portraits that speak to the soul while Mischelle Moy embraces the beauty of nature through vibrant colors and mesmerizing landscapes.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E4: Cole Rise + Kate Winsy — A fusion of the diverse artistic visions of our featured artists. Cole Rise mesmerizes with otherworldly landscapes bathed in soft hues while Kate Winsy invites viewers into a serene visual journey where nature's beauty takes center stage.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour E1 — A jubilant tribute capturing the essence of merriment and relaxation through a symphony of colors, paired with the musical genres of electro, deep house and lounge. Each piece bursts with bold, expressive designs celebrating the beauty of unwinding.

programme.title: New Year Cheer
programme.desc: New Year Cheer E1 — Experience the essence of NYE through a vibrant collection of art, pulsating with celebratory energy. Melodies are held by saxophones, synth-pads, and keys while mid to high-tempo tunes set the perfect tone to usher in your New Year with cheer.
